prerequisites.label: Skill 05 - GHL Setup
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Skill 05 (GHL Setup) first. It is in the same onboarding package; re-run the installer or install Skill 05 on its own.

prerequisites.label: Skill 01 - Teach Yourself Protocol (TYP)
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Skill 01 (01-teach-yourself-protocol) into ~/.openclaw/skills (/data/.openclaw/skills on a VPS/Docker box). SKILL.md declares it mandatory: 'Teach Yourself Protocol (TYP) must be learned first (skill 01)'. It is in the same onboarding package; re-run the installer or install Skill 01 on its own.

prerequisites.label: Skill 02 - Back Yourself Up Protocol
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Skill 02 (02-back-yourself-up-protocol) into ~/.openclaw/skills (/data/.openclaw/skills on a VPS/Docker box). SKILL.md declares it mandatory: 'Backup Protocol must be learned first (skill 02)'. It is in the same onboarding package; re-run the installer or install Skill 02 on its own.

prerequisites.label: Skill 03 - agent-browser (PRIMARY browser engine)
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Skill 03 (03-agent-browser) into ~/.openclaw/skills (/data/.openclaw/skills on a VPS/Docker box). SKILL.md declares it mandatory: 'agent-browser must be installed (skill 03) - PRIMARY browser engine'. Without it every page build falls back to the Playwright engine, which SKILL.md documents as the fallback for known-hard flows only.
